message:
Fix breadcrumb styling to respect brand guidelines

Override library defaults with !important declarations for color and
text-decoration to ensure breadcrumbs follow brand colors. Include
:link and :visited pseudo-classes for complete link state coverage.

Fix disabled breadcrumb links showing blue underlines by including the
c-breadcrumbs__link base class alongside breadcrumb-disabled. The
astro-breadcrumbs library replaces the class attribute rather than
merging it, so the base styling was being lost on disabled links.

🤖 Generated with Claude Code

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
